SEARCH
Package io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project

Class GameScreen

java.lang.Object
com.badlogic.gdx.InputAdapter
io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.GameScreen
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.badlogic.gdx.InputProcessor, com.badlogic.gdx.Screen, com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Disposable
public class GameScreen extends com.badlogic.gdx.InputAdapter implements com.badlogic.gdx.Screen
The class that manages the graphics on the screen during the game

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private Recognizer
    createCurrentRecognizer()
    Returns the recognizer that should be used right now (for example, if there are no circles left, it shouldn't recognize circles)
    void
    dispose()
    Inherited method from the screen class that we are not using
    private void
    drawGhosts(Level level)
    Draws all the ghosts (and shapes) in the current ghostTurn.
    private void
    drawHearts(Cat c)
    Draws the hearts in the corner of the screen based on the lives the cat has left
    private void
    drawPauseOverlay()
    Draws the image the player sees when the game is currently paused (with the text in the middle)
    private void
    drawPlayPause()
    Draws the play and pause buttons based on whether the game is currently running or paused
    private void
    drawScore()
    Draws the score in the corner of the screen, utilizing a different viewport and a FreeTypeFont
    private void
    drawShield()
    Draws the shield at the cat's current position

  • Constructor Details

    • GameScreen

      public GameScreen(Main game)
      Constructs a GameScreen object, initializing static fields
      Parameters:
      game - the Main class used for textures and shifting screens.

  • Method Details

    • show

      public void show()
      Initializes textures, fonts, and fills up the fields initialized in the constructor
      Specified by:
      show in interface com.badlogic.gdx.Screen

    • drawGhosts

      private void drawGhosts(Level level)
      Draws all the ghosts (and shapes) in the current ghostTurn. The current ghostTurn is accessed through the level.
      Parameters:
      level - the level to draw ghosts from

    • createCurrentRecognizer

      private Recognizer createCurrentRecognizer()
      Returns the recognizer that should be used right now (for example, if there are no circles left, it shouldn't recognize circles)
      Returns:
      the recognition that should be used at that current moment

    • render

      public void render(float delta)
      Renders the image on the screen, using helper methods as necessary
      Specified by:
      render in interface com.badlogic.gdx.Screen
      Parameters:
      delta - The time in seconds since the last render.

    • drawShield

      private void drawShield()
      Draws the shield at the cat's current position

    • drawHearts

      private void drawHearts(Cat c)
      Draws the hearts in the corner of the screen based on the lives the cat has left
      Parameters:
      c - the cat object for this game (contains info on lives)

    • drawScore

      private void drawScore()
      Draws the score in the corner of the screen, utilizing a different viewport and a FreeTypeFont

    • drawPlayPause

      private void drawPlayPause()
      Draws the play and pause buttons based on whether the game is currently running or paused

    • drawPauseOverlay

      private void drawPauseOverlay()
      Draws the image the player sees when the game is currently paused (with the text in the middle)

    • resize

      public void resize(int width, int height)
      Resizes the screen based on the parameters
      Specified by:
      resize in interface com.badlogic.gdx.Screen
      Parameters:
      width - the width of the screen to resize to
      height - the height of the screen to resize to

    • pause

      public void pause()
      Inherited method from the screen class that we are not using
      Specified by:
      pause in interface com.badlogic.gdx.Screen

    • resume

      public void resume()
      Inherited method from the screen class that we are not using
      Specified by:
      resume in interface com.badlogic.gdx.Screen

    • hide

      public void hide()
      Inherited method from the screen class that we are not using
      Specified by:
      hide in interface com.badlogic.gdx.Screen

    • dispose

      public void dispose()
      Inherited method from the screen class that we are not using
      Specified by:
      dispose in interface com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Disposable
      Specified by:
      dispose in interface com.badlogic.gdx.Screen

    • touchDown

      public boolean touchDown(int screenX, int screenY, int pointer, int button)
      Inherited methods from the InputAdapter class that deal with whether the mouse is down (starts drawing points)
      Specified by:
      touchDown in interface com.badlogic.gdx.InputProcessor
      Overrides:
      touchDown in class com.badlogic.gdx.InputAdapter
      Parameters:
      screenX - The x coordinate, origin is in the upper left corner
      screenY - The y coordinate, origin is in the upper left corner
      pointer - the pointer for the event.
      button - the button
      Returns:
      always true in our case ( we need a boolean return to inherit from the libGDX class)

    • touchDragged

      public boolean touchDragged(int screenX, int screenY, int pointer)
      Called when the mouse is dragged on the screen. In this method, we apply the recognizer live and change the color based on the current recognized stroke
      Specified by:
      touchDragged in interface com.badlogic.gdx.InputProcessor
      Overrides:
      touchDragged in class com.badlogic.gdx.InputAdapter
      Parameters:
      screenX - the x location on the screen
      screenY - the y location on the screen
      pointer - the pointer for the event.
      Returns:
      always true in our case ( we need a boolean return to inherit from the libGDX class)

    • touchUp

      public boolean touchUp(int screenX, int screenY, int pointer, int button)
      When a drag or touch is removed from the screen, this is called. Calls the shapeDrawn level method based on the shape drawn, and also updates the cat's costume
      Specified by:
      touchUp in interface com.badlogic.gdx.InputProcessor
      Overrides:
      touchUp in class com.badlogic.gdx.InputAdapter
      Parameters:
      screenX - the x position of the screen
      screenY - the y position of the screen
      pointer - the pointer for the event.
      button - the button
      Returns:
      false if the level is completed, otherwise true
